'''Kendel''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] stationed at the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|shipyards]] at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]].

During the [[rawmat shortage of 1–2 ABY]], when faced with one hundred [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] that were left languishing in their docks without proper [[Doonium/Legends|doonium]] hull plating, Kendel hit upon the unorthodox idea of processing [[Havod/Legends|havod]] metal alloy plates for these vessels. While havod was more difficult to process than doonium and came with a distinct red color, it met all [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] specifications, and Kendel made a special order to have the metal processed into hull plating.

Kendel's decision was widely criticized, both by [[Harod Crimmler|outside commentators]] and by crewers scheduled to serve on the refurbished ships.
